worktree_state.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
  "id": "payment",
  "name": "Payment Module",
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "status": "stub",
  "description": "Ödeme entegrasyonu - iyzico, Stripe ve diğer ödeme yöntemlerinin yönetimi",

  "type": "feature",
  "category": "payment",

  "author": {
    "name": "E-Menum Team",
    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
  },

  "compatibility": {
    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
    "node": ">=20.0.0"
  },

  "dependencies": {
    "modules": ["auth", "organization", "order"],
    "optional": ["notification"]
  },

  "provides": {
    "services": ["IPaymentService", "IPaymentGatewayService"],
    "events": [
      "payment.initiated",
      "payment.completed",
      "payment.failed",
      "payment.refunded",
      "payment.cancelled"
    ],
    "permissions": [
      "payment:read",
      "payment:create",
      "payment:refund",
      "payment:configure"
    ]
  },

  "tier": {
    "minimum": "starter",
    "features": {
      "starter": ["basic_payments", "manual_entry"],
      "professional": ["basic_payments", "manual_entry", "iyzico"],
      "business": ["basic_payments", "manual_entry", "iyzico", "stripe", "reports"],
      "enterprise": ["basic_payments", "manual_entry", "iyzico", "stripe", "reports", "custom_gateway", "split_payments"]
    }
  },

  "plannedFeatures": [
    "Credit card payments",
    "Bank transfer",
    "iyzico integration",
    "Stripe integration",
    "Payment refunds",
    "Split payments",
    "Payment reports",
    "Recurring payments"
  ],

  "estimatedRelease": "Q2 2026"
}
